description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.6-alpine Docker image with a global before_script that installs gcc and musl-dev via apk, installs Poetry with pip, and runs poetry install. Define a single unittest stage and add two jobs: test py3.6, which uses the python:3.6-alpine image and executes `poetry run python -m bgez.__test__`; and test py3.7, which uses the python:3.7-alpine image and runs the same command. Both jobs inherit the global before_script, have no caches, artifacts, or special rules, and run on any branch.
